app.name: FranchiseHub
app.tagline: Franchise control tower for Philippine franchisors.
app.shortDescription: Branches, sales reports, royalties, compliance, documents, and support — in one place.

phase0.label: Phase 0 — Foundation
phase0.description: Scaffold live. App, auth, and dashboards arrive in Phase 1–2 per PLAN.md.

auth.signInSubtitle: Use the email and password your head office set up for you.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Set up your access. A head office admin will assign your role afterwards.
auth.passwordHint: At least 12 characters, with uppercase, lowercase, number, and symbol.
auth.checkEmail: Account created. Please check your email to confirm your address, then sign in.

dashboard.phase2Note: More modules — sales reports, royalty review, compliance checklists, tickets — arrive in upcoming Phase 2 commits.
dashboard.noRoleAssigned: No role assigned yet. A head office admin will set up your access shortly.

notice.forbidden: You don't have access to that page. If you think you should, please contact your head office admin.
notice.noFranchisor: Add a franchisor first before creating branches or franchisees. Ask a Super Admin to set one up.

branches.title: Branches
branches.description: Manage every branch in your franchise network.

franchisees.title: Franchisees
franchisees.description: Track franchisees, contracts, and renewal status.

myBranches.title: My branches
myBranches.description: View the branches you operate or manage.

salesReports.title: Sales reports
salesReports.description: Submit and review daily or weekly sales.

royalties.title: Royalties
royalties.description: See royalty computations and pay your invoices.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.description: Track permits, renewals, and required documents.

tickets.title: Support tickets
tickets.description: Raise an issue or follow up on an open request.

branches.title: Branches
branches.subtitle: Every branch in your network, with location, status, and contact info.
branches.newSubtitle: Set up a new branch. Fields with no asterisk are optional and can be filled in later.
branches.name: Branch name
branches.confirmArchive: Archive this branch? It will stop appearing in active lists but stays in the audit trail.
branches.emptyDescriptionAdmin: Add the first branch to start tracking sales reports and compliance.
branches.emptyDescriptionViewer: Branches will appear here once head office adds them.
branches.emptyDescriptionBranch: You are not assigned to any branches yet. Contact your head office admin.

franchisees.title: Franchisees
franchisees.subtitle: Track every franchisee, their territories, and contract renewal status.
franchisees.newSubtitle: Create the franchisee record. You can assign branches to them afterwards.
franchisees.confirmArchive: Archive this franchisee? It will stop appearing in active lists but stays in the audit trail.
franchisees.emptyDescriptionAdmin: Add your first franchisee to start tracking their branches and contract.
franchisees.emptyDescriptionViewer: Franchisees will appear here once head office adds them.
franchisees.emptyDescriptionOwner: Your franchisee record is being set up. Check back shortly.
